title: <div>Here is a complete prompt chain designed for high-performance Large Languag
content:
Here is a complete prompt chain designed for high-performance Large Language Models (LLMs).
These prompts utilize best practices such as Persona Adoption, Chain-of-Thought reasoning, Constraint setting, and Structured Output requirements to ensure high-quality results.
How to use: Paste the prompt into the AI, replacing the [INSERT CONTENT HERE] placeholder with your text.
Step 1: Critique
Purpose: Provide a comprehensive evaluation of strengths and weaknesses.
> Prompt:
> Act as a Senior Editor and Critical Analyst. Your task is to perform a "Critique" on the content provided below. Evaluate the text holistically, looking at structure, clarity, tone, and overall effectiveness.
> Please provide your analysis in the following format:
> * Executive Summary: A 2-sentence overview of the content's quality.
> * Key Strengths: Bullet points highlighting what works well and why.
> * Critical Weaknesses: Bullet points highlighting areas that are vague, weak, or confusing.
> * Actionable Recommendations: Specific instructions on how to fix the weaknesses identified.
